title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Health Board 2022 - 001, Dated February 16, 2022, Entitled ?resolution Recommending the Hiring of Five (5) Additional Barangay Health Workers and to Increase the Barangay Health Worker?s Allowance From Three Thousand Pesos (P3,000.00) to Four Thousand Pesos (P4,000.00) Per Month Subject to Availability of Funds.? (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MAK LESTER B. DIZON, 06/20/22)
